DP.072.0000:
Have you ever seen or heard about
differently colored Pokémon?\f
For instance, a regular PIKACHU has
a yellow body, correct?\f
Well, the different-colored PIKACHU
has a sort of orange body.
DP.072.0001:
You know how Pokémon have different
natures like we have personalities?\f
I don’t think it’s surprising to see
Pokémon in different colors.
